plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-231 RP06.P09.M03.S11-RP06.P09.M05.S08 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.

implementation_summary.summary: CP00-231 implements descriptor-only coverage of the RP06.P09.M03 primary slice tail (including review receipt placeholder and future correction slot rows), the full M04 secondary workflow review-gate cycle, and the M05 permission/audit binding head (40 rows across three sections) with Hermes evidence, Claude review packet, and CP00-232 handoff, without opening review runtime, Hermes runtime receipt emission, command runtime execution, DMS runtime dispatch, review/approval route runtime, state writes, idempotency persistence, workflow persistence, object storage, OCR, search, email, Citation Ledger, or Loop behavior.

parsed_review.summary:
CP00-231 is a clean, descriptor-only DMS-core review-gate slice pack covering exactly the 40 planned RP06 units (RP06.P09.M03.S11-RP06.P09.M05.S08, Risk B). The pack baseline is identical across the live closeout-pack-plan, review-baseline, manifest plan_binding_snapshot, registry DMS_CORE_CP231_PACK_BINDING, and contract current_pack (matching ledger SHA). Deliverable distribution (implementation 25 / claude_review 6 / hermes_evidence 1 / security_audit 4 / test 2 / ui 2 = 40) and micro-title distribution (Primary Implementation Slice 12 / Secondary Workflow Slice 20 / Permission And Audit Binding 8 = 40) match the baseline exactly and are enforced by validateDmsCoreCp231Coverage. All 7 required public exports exist (createDmsCoreCp231ReviewGateSliceCaseSet/Descriptor in service.js; validateDmsCoreCp231Coverage, validateDmsCoreCp231ReviewGateSliceDescriptor, createDmsCoreCp231HermesEvidencePacket/ClaudeReviewPacket/CloseoutHandoff in validators.js) and are reachable through index.js wildcard re-exports (confirmed by passing named imports in model.test.js and validate-rp06-dms-core-contract.mjs, both from src/index.js, with node --check/node --test/npm run build at exit 0).

Boundaries verified: freezeCp231Result forces every runtime/write/dispatch/real-data flag false; DMS_CORE_CP231_NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION and the contract no_write_attestation agree; manifest implementation_summary asserts descriptor_only/synthetic_only/no-runtime across review, Hermes receipt, command, permission/audit, object storage, OCR, search, email, Citation Ledger and Loop. No conflict markers, secrets, or real data found in changed source (all matches are negative attestations such as real_client_data_loaded:false). The pack-level production_ready claim is correctly false (status implemented_pending_review); no production_ready gate is weakened.

Authority boundary holds: authority_boundary.claude_is_final_approval=false, go_no_go_verdict_format.claude_final_approval_claimed=false, human_approval_summary.human_approval_route_required_before_runtime=true, allowed_claude_tools=[Read,Grep,Glob], and enterprise_trust_not_claimed_from_local_validation=true; these are enforced by validateDmsCoreCp231ReviewGateSliceDescriptor and three dedicated tests. Hermes patterns are used only as deterministic evidence-packet/receipt descriptors (receipt_shape descriptor_only_review_gate_slice_no_write; no_hermes_runtime_receipt=true), not product runtime. CP178+ review hardening is satisfied: inherited forbidden_review_evidence covers auth_failure, stdout_0_bytes, malformed_json, fenced_json_plus_prose, tool_call_shaped_output, claude_final_approval_claim, source_mutation_claim, and production_or_enterprise_trust_claim; the readiness auth-preflight passed with non-empty valid JSON; no invalid review attempts are attributed to this pack (the docs/ldip-integration c-ldip-01 invalid attempt belongs to an unrelated workstream and is correctly preserved as unrelated-dirty, not part of CP00-231 scope).

No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings. The review does not block pack or goal closeout. Closeout remains correctly gated on the still-pending hardening steps (claude-review-result.json normalization, receipt validation, finding adjudication, construction inspection), the post-review validation commands listed in command-evidence, and human final approval for any enterprise-trust/runtime-opening claim — all of which are outside this read-only review receipt and acknowledged as such.

commit_policy.message: Close CP00-231 dms core review gate slice descriptor pack
